nodes.name: Read Image JPG Files From Disk

parameters.jsonBody:
={{
  JSON.stringify({
    model: "gpt-4o-mini",
    max_tokens: 1024,
    temperature: 0.1,
    messages: [
      {
        role: "system",
        content: "You are a data entry agent. Extract structured information from enrollment form. Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown fences, no explanation. The dates are always represented in dd/mm/yyyy or dd-mm/yyyy format. Return all dates in dd/mm/yyyy format."
      },
      {
        role: "user",
        filename: $('Read PDF Files from Disk').item.json.fileName,
        content: "Analyze the enrollment form from: " + $('Read PDF Files from Disk').item.json.fileName +
          "\n\nEXTRACTEDTEXT:\n" + $json.text +
          "\n\nReturn JSON with exactly these fields:\n" +
          JSON.stringify({
            filename: $('Read PDF Files from Disk').item.json.fileName,
            start_date: "date",
            time_slot: "string",
            child_father_surname: "string",
            child_mother_surname: "string",
            child_name: "string",
            DNI: "string",
            nationality: "string",
            birth_date: "date",
            religion: "string",
            address: "string",
            mother_name: "string",
            mother_place_of_work: "string",
            mother_phone: "string",
            mother_mobile: "string",
            mother_email: "string",
            father_name: "string",
            father_place_of_work: "string",
            father_phone: "string",
            father_mobile: "string",
            father_email: "string",
            diseases: "string",
            allergies: "string",
            isapre: "string"

            
          }, null, 2)
      }
    ]
  })
}}

nodes.name: PDF Fields Mapping OpenAI API Call

parameters.jsonBody:
={{
  JSON.stringify({
    model: "gpt-4o-mini",
    max_tokens: 1024,
    temperature: 0.1,
    messages: [
      {
        role: "system",
        content: "You are a data entry agent. Extract structured information from enrollment form. Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown fences, no explanation. The dates are always represented in dd/mm/yyyy or dd-mm/yyyy format. Return all dates in dd/mm/yyyy format."
      },
      {
        role: "user",
        filename: $json.filename,
        content: "Analyze the enrollment form from: " + $json.fileName +
          "\n\nEXTRACTEDTEXT:\n" + $json.extractedText +
          "\n\nReturn JSON with exactly these fields:\n" +
          JSON.stringify({
            filename: $json.filename,
            start_date: "date",
            time_slot: "string",
            child_father_surname: "string",
            child_mother_surname: "string",
            child_name: "string",
            DNI: "string",
            nationality: "string",
            birth_date: "date",
            religion: "string",
            address: "string",
            mother_name: "string",
            mother_place_of_work: "string",
            mother_phone: "string",
            mother_mobile: "string",
            mother_email: "string",
            father_name: "string",
            father_place_of_work: "string",
            father_phone: "string",
            father_mobile: "string",
            father_email: "string",
            diseases: "string",
            allergies: "string",
            isapre: "string"

            
          }, null, 2)
      }
    ]
  })
}}

nodes.name: DOCX Fields Mapping OpenAI API Call

parameters.jsonBody:
={{
  JSON.stringify({
    model: "gpt-4o-mini",
    max_tokens: 1024,
    temperature: 0.1,
    messages: [
      {
        role: "system",
        content: "You are a data entry agent. Extract structured information from enrollment form. Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown fences, no explanation. The dates are always represented in dd/mm/yyyy or dd-mm/yyyy format. Return all dates in dd/mm/yyyy format."
      },
      {
        role: "user",
        filename: $('Read Image JPG Files From Disk').item.json.fileName,
        content: "Analyze the enrollment form from: " + $('Read Image JPG Files From Disk').item.json.fileName +
          "\n\nEXTRACTEDTEXT:\n" + $json.responses[0].textAnnotations[0].description +
          "\n\nReturn JSON with exactly these fields:\n" +
          JSON.stringify({
            filename: $('Read Image JPG Files From Disk').item.json.fileName,
            start_date: "date",
            time_slot: "string",
            child_father_surname: "string",
            child_mother_surname: "string",
            child_name: "string",
            DNI: "string",
            nationality: "string",
            birth_date: "date",
            religion: "string",
            address: "string",
            mother_name: "string",
            mother_place_of_work: "string",
            mother_phone: "string",
            mother_mobile: "string",
            mother_email: "string",
            father_name: "string",
            father_place_of_work: "string",
            father_phone: "string",
            father_mobile: "string",
            father_email: "string",
            diseases: "string",
            allergies: "string",
            isapre: "string"

            
          }, null, 2)
      }
    ]
  })
}}
